title: Hiring Software Engineer at Grofers Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Grofers Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers Advisory Limited family as a Software Engineer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
